title: FFTA Ianseo Training - V1
description: Guided course based on the simplified FFTA tutorial and Ianseo user guide, with automatic checks on the active tournament.

course.title: FFTA training path
course.description: From setup to the federation TXT export.

context.title: Training tournament
context.noTournament: Open or create an Ianseo tournament first. The module will then work on that tournament.
context.liveExample: Live example: if archer {archer} exists, the course can use this archer in the next instructions.

validation.notChecked: This step has not been checked yet.
validation.checked: Check done: some items still need fixing.

equipment.title: Equipment and access
equipment.goal: Check that the training environment is ready and a tournament is open.
equipment.reference: Reference: workstation setup, browser access, local Ianseo server, current tournament context.

updateResources.title: Ianseo and FFTA resource updates
updateResources.goal: Review Ianseo updates and federation resource synchronization before creating the tournament.
updateResources.reference: Reference: Ianseo update workflow and federation resource update reminders from the training documents.

createCompetition.title: Create the tournament
createCompetition.goal: Create a training tournament with a code, name, location and dates.
createCompetition.reference: Reference: tournament creation and competition information screens.

configureFfta18m.title: Configure FFTA indoor 18m
configureFfta18m.goal: Select French rules, Indoor 18m / 2 distances and the expected sub-rule.
configureFfta18m.reference: Reference: FFTA indoor competition type and local rule selection.

sessions.title: Configure sessions
sessions.goal: Create sessions, target count, archers per target and timings.
sessions.reference: Reference: departures, target count, archers per target and timetable setup.

distancesClasses.title: Distances, divisions and classes
distancesClasses.goal: Check that divisions, classes and distances were generated from the FFTA rules.
distancesClasses.reference: Reference: generated categories, bow divisions, age classes and distances.

officials.title: Staff and judges
officials.goal: Introduce the staff management screen. In V1, validation is pedagogical and non-blocking.
officials.reference: Reference: organizing staff and judge information screens.

participants.title: Participants
participants.goal: Create or import at least two archers, for example {archer}, with license, club, division and class.
participants.reference: Reference: participant entry, lookup, club, license, division and class fields.

targetAssignment.title: Target assignment
targetAssignment.goal: Assign at least one archer to a target using manual assignment or the advanced list.
targetAssignment.reference: Reference: manual target assignment and advanced assignment list.

scoreSheets.title: Score sheets and QR codes
scoreSheets.goal: Prepare score sheet printing. Automatic validation checks that targets exist before printing.
scoreSheets.reference: Reference: score sheet printing and QR code workflow.

scoreEntry.title: Score entry and verification
scoreEntry.goal: Enter at least one score, then explain paper / Scorekeeper verification.
scoreEntry.reference: Reference: score entry, consistency checks, totals, 10s and X/9s.

rankingExport.title: Rankings and TXT export
rankingExport.goal: Recalculate rankings and prepare the federation TXT export after the tournament.
rankingExport.reference: Reference: qualification ranking, recalculation and FFTA TXT export.

identity.summary: The module can fill a neutral training identity so the trainee focuses on the required fields.
instructions: Open the competition information screen and review the code, name, venue and dates.
Adjust one visible field, save, then validate the step here.
identity.expected: Expected state: the tournament has a code, a name or place, and a start date.

ffta18m.summary: Prepare the tournament as a French indoor 18m training event.
instructions: Review the competition type and local rules after seed preparation.
If your Ianseo version offers more precise FFTA sub-rules, select the one used by the trainer.
ffta18m.expected: Expected state: French rules are selected and the tournament is configured as indoor 18m or two distances.

sessions.summary: Create two classroom departures with targets and four archers per target.
instructions: Confirm there is at least one departure with target count and archers per target.
sessions.expected: Expected state: at least one session has target capacity and archers per target.

taxonomy.summary: Seed a minimal recurve Senior 1 taxonomy when the training database is empty.
instructions: Open division, class and distance screens.
Check that generated FFTA values exist or complete them from the trainer instructions.
taxonomy.expected: Expected state: divisions, classes and distances exist for the active tournament.

participants.summary: Add two training archers that can be reused by later practical cases.
instructions: Open the participants screen and inspect Camille Martin and Noa Bernard.
Complete any missing FFTA fields requested by the trainer, such as club, license, class or division.
participants.expected: Expected state: at least two participants exist in the tournament.

wrongTarget.summary: Camille Martin is intentionally assigned to the wrong target.
instructions: Open target assignment and find Camille Martin.
Move Camille Martin from target 001A to target 002A, then save the assignment.
wrongTarget.expected: Expected state: FFTA-FORM-001 / Camille Martin is assigned to target 002A.

scores.summary: Seed a small scored qualification so trainees can practice score checks and rankings.
instructions: Open score entry and inspect the two training archers.
Change or confirm one score, then recalculate rankings from Ianseo.
scores.expected: Expected state: at least one qualification score exists; ranking recalculation is checked in the final step.
